div.style: font-family:Arial; font-size:10px; background-color:#fff; border:solid 1px #fff; padding:5px 0px 5px 0px; border-top:solid 1px #aaa;border-bottom:solid 1px #aaa; text-align:center

genericemailmessagefootertemplate.div:
This email message was sent on behalf of [BUSINESSNAMEANDADDRESS].
This message was sent to the following e-mail address: [TOEMAIL]. Not interested in receiving emails? It's easy to [UNSUBSCRIBELINK]. Be sure to add [FROMEMAIL] to your address book or safe senders list so our emails get to your inbox.
